title: Kiss a Friend!
description: Ever wanted to kiss your friends in Minecraft? Now you can!
body:
# Kiss a Friend!

Ever wanted to kiss your friends in Minecraft? Now you can!

![icon](https://codeberg.org/slonk/kiss-a-friend/raw/branch/main/src/main/resources/assets/kiss-a-friend/icon.png)

Simply sneak while looking at each other to initiate a kiss!

Name was suggested by my friend who developed [Headpat a Friend!](https://modrinth.com/plugin/headpat).

## Estrogen integration

Integration with the [Estrogen](https://modrinth.com/mod/estrogen) (fka. *Create: Estrogen*) mod is available in the form of Estrogen Transfer on Kiss, giving the other player half the duration of your Girl Power effect without subtracting from yours. Sharing is caring!

This feature can be turned off in the mod options or config file.

Note: The Estrogen mod is only available for 1.20.1, but the integration will work when it's ported to the latest version without updating this mod.
